entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
정쟁 때 CB아시카가CZ 당주는 CC교토CZ를 떠났고,
현 쇼군 CA아시카가 [bm75]CZ도
CC교토CZ 아닌 CC오미CZ에서 원복해 쇼군이 됐다.

direct_pc_sources.en: During times of political turmoil, the leader of the CBAshikaga ClanCZ would depart the CCcapitalCZ. Accordingly, the current shªgun, CA[bm75] AshikagaCZ, came of age and assumed his title not in the CCcapitalCZ but in CC¥miCZ.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
政争のたびにCB足利家CZ当主はCC京CZを離れ、
現将軍CA足利[bm75]CZもCC京CZではなく
CC近江CZで元服し、将軍職に就いた。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
每次政治斗争都迫使CB足利家CZ当家离CC京CZ，
现任将军CA足利[bm75]CZ也是在CC京CZ之外的
CC近江CZ行元服礼，就任将军。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
每次發生政爭時，CB足利家CZ家主便離CC京CZ，
故現任將軍CA足利[bm75]CZ只能在CC近江CZ
完成元服禮，就任將軍。

entries.proposed_ko:
정쟁 때마다 CB아시카가 가문CZ의 당주는 CC교토CZ를 떠났고,
현 쇼군 CA아시카가 [bm75]CZ 또한

entries.review_judgement: Restore repeated political strife, departure from Kyoto, the current shogun's genpuku in Omi, and accession to the shogunate.

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
무로마치 막부 본거지는 CC교토CZ다.
CA[bm75]CZ도 CC교토CZ 귀환을 꾀해
CC교토CZ의 CB미요시 가문CZ과 교섭했지만……

direct_pc_sources.en: However, the Muromachi ShªgunateÖs main base was indeed situated in the CCcapitalCZ. CA[bm75]CZ plotted many times to return to the CCcapitalCZ, negotiating with the controlling CBMiyoshi ClanCZ to little avail...
direct_pc_sources.jp:
だが、やはり室町幕府の本拠はCC京CZである。
CA[bm75]CZもまた、何度かCC京CZへ戻ろうと画策し
CC京CZを支配するCB三好家CZと交渉したが…
direct_pc_sources.sc:
可室町幕府的大本营终究是CC京城CZ。
CA[bm75]CZ也数次筹划返CC京CZ事宜，
并与支配CC京城CZ的CB三好家CZ交涉……
direct_pc_sources.tc:
然而，CC京都CZ終究是室町幕府的根據地。
CA[bm75]CZ亦曾多次策劃返CC京CZ，
與支配CC京都CZ的CB三好家CZ進行交涉……

CC교토CZ를 지배하는 CB미요시 가문CZ과 교섭했지만……

하지만 무로마치 막부의 본거지는 역시 CC교토CZ였다.

CC교토CZ를 지배하는 CB미요시 가문CZ과 교섭했지만……
entries.review_judgement: Restore the Muromachi base, repeated return attempts, Kyoto's Miyoshi rulers, and the failed negotiations without shortening the legacy connective.

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
CB미요시가CZ는 본래 CB호소카와 가문CZ의 가신.
CA[bm75]CZ 눈엔 가신의 가신.
자존심 탓에 교섭은 진전 없었다.

direct_pc_sources.en: The CBMiyoshi ClanCZ were originally retainers of the CBHosokawa ClanCZ. As such, from CA[bm75]CZÖs perspective, they were no more than vassals. Perhaps owing to this pride, negotiations did not go well.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CB三好家CZは本来、CB細川家CZの家臣。
つまりCA[bm75]CZから見れば陪臣に過ぎない。
自尊心が邪魔してか、交渉は進まなかった。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CB三好家CZ原本是CB细川家CZ的家臣。
对CA[bm75]CZ而言他们只是区区陪臣。
或许是自尊心作祟，交涉始终没有进展。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CB三好家CZ原為CB細川家CZ的家臣。
就CA[bm75]CZ而言，CB三好家CZ僅一介陪臣。
或許因自尊心作祟，交涉窒礙難行。

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
CA미요시 나가요시CZ를 오토모슈, 곧
CB쇼군가CZ 직신으로 인정해 화의가 성립,
CA[bm75]CZ의 CC교토CZ 귀환이 임박.

direct_pc_sources.en: Peace was achieved via the recognition of CANagayoshi MiyoshiCZ as Otomo Agent, essentially a direct retainer of the CBshªgunateCZ. CA[bm75]CZÖs return to the CCcapitalCZ was finally in sight.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA三好長慶CZを御供衆すなわちCB将軍家CZ直臣と
認定することで両者の和睦は成立。
遂にCA[bm75]CZのCC京CZ帰還が視野に入る。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CA三好长庆CZ被认定为御供众，成为CB将军家CZ嫡系，
双方以此达成和解。
CA[bm75]CZ的回CC京CZ计划终于有眉目了。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CA[bm75]CZ承認CA三好長慶CZ為御供眾，
即CB將軍家CZ直臣，雙方因此達成和解。
CA[bm75]CZ的返CC京CZ指日可待。

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
본래 CB미요시가CZ 화친에 소극적이던
CA[bm75]CZ 측근 CA하루모토CZ 동조.
CA[bm75]CZ도 더는 변명 못했다.

direct_pc_sources.en: Eventually, even associates of CA[bm75]CZ who were initially indifferent to peace talks with the CBMiyoshi ClanCZ began sympathizing with CAHarumotoCZ, forcing CA[bm75]CZ to address the situation.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
やがて、元々CB三好家CZとの和睦に消極的だった
CA[bm75]CZ側近の中にもCA晴元CZに同調する動きが現れ、
CA[bm75]CZももはや言い逃れできない状況に陥る。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
很快，此前对与CB三好家CZ的和谈持消极态度的
CA[bm75]CZ亲信之中也出现了配合CA晴元CZ展开行动的人，
CA[bm75]CZ也陷入了难以推脱的局面。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
不久後，對與CB三好家CZ和解本就態度消極的
CA[bm75]CZ親信當中亦出現CA晴元CZ的贊同者，
令CA[bm75]CZ陷入難辭其咎的境地。

entries.legacy_precompaction_ko:
이윽고 본래 CB미요시 가문CZ과의 화친에 소극적이던
CA[bm75]CZ의 측근 중에도 CA하루모토CZ에 동조하는 자가 생겨,
CA[bm75]CZ 본인도 더는 발뺌할 수 없는 처지에 몰렸다.
entries.proposed_ko:
이윽고 본래 CB미요시 가문CZ과의 화친에
소극적이던 CA[bm75]CZ의 측근 중에도
CA하루모토CZ에 동조하는 자가 생겨, CA[bm75]CZ 본인도
더는 발뺌할 수 없는 처지에 몰렸다.
entries.review_judgement: Restore the initially peace-sceptical retainers, their support for Harumoto, and the shogun's inability to evade the issue. Four lines are used at Korean phrase boundaries for two conservative token reservations.

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
CA[bm75]CZ는 교토 입성을
꾀했으나 CB미요시 세력CZ에 막혀 CC히가시야마CZ
CC료젠성CZ에 틀어박혀 화의도 무너졌다.

direct_pc_sources.en: CA[bm75]CZ attempted to enter the CCcapitalCZ only to be thwarted by the wary CBMiyoshi ClanCZ, driving him to hole up in CCRyªzen CastleCZ in CCHigashiyamaCZ. Peace negotiations broke down completely.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
それでもCA[bm75]CZは入京を試みるが、警戒する
CB三好勢CZに阻まれ、CC東山CZのCC霊山城CZに籠城。
ここにおいて、和議は完全に崩壊した。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
仍未死心的CA[bm75]CZ尝试进京，却受到警戒中的
CB三好势力CZ阻拦，只得守在CC东山CZ的CC灵山城CZ。
于是和谈彻底宣告决裂。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
儘管如此，CA[bm75]CZ仍試圖入京，但遭到
心懷警戒的CB三好勢力CZ阻撓，於焉坐守CC東山CZ的
CC靈山城CZ。事態演變至此，議和完全決裂。

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
CA요시모토CZ가 CA[b1251]CZ에 제의하자,
CA[bm1251]CZ도 흔쾌히 가담했고,
이는 곧 CA우지야스CZ에게 전해졌다.

direct_pc_sources.en: CAYoshimotoCZ proposed a joint operation to CA[b1251]CZ, who accepted and joined his force. CAUjiyasuCZ was informed of this immediately.

CA義元CZはCA[b1251]CZにも共同作戦を申し出、
CA[bm1251]CZも快諾してこの攻撃に加わっている。
これらの動きは、すぐにCA氏康CZに伝わった。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CA义元CZ亦向CA[b1251]CZ提出共同作战的请求，
而CA[bm1251]CZ也欣然应允。
这些动向立刻传达到了CA氏康CZ耳中。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CA義元CZ也向CA[b1251]CZ提議共同作戰。
CA[bm1251]CZ爽快地答應並加入了攻擊行動。
這些動向很快就傳到CA氏康CZ耳裡。

いや、我らに対する此度のCA義元CZの包囲網…
隙があるとすれば西側だ。
CA義元CZの陣に加わっている…CA[b1251]CZ。

不，此次CA义元CZ针对我们的包围……

그 속셈을 역이용하자…!

direct_pc_sources.en: CA[bm1251]CZ is difficult to control. I have no doubt that in assisting CAYoshimotoCZ he plans to gain something for himself. We must make use of that!
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA[bm1251]CZこそ最も食えぬ男よ。CA義元CZに協力する
素振りで、密かに漁夫の利を狙っておる。
それを逆にこちらが利用する…！
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CA[bm1251]CZ才是最难以对付的对手。他表面上是要与
CA义元CZ合作，背地里却在等待收获渔翁之利。
如果我们能反过来利用他的这种想法……！
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CA[bm1251]CZ是最不能小覷的男人。他假裝幫助CA義元CZ，
暗地裡卻想坐收漁翁之利。
我們要反過來利用這點……！

CB武田家CZ家主一事广为人知。

厭惡CA[bm1251]CZ的CA信虎CZ打算讓他成為
CB武田家CZ家主，而使其聲名大噪。

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
99조 다케다 노부시게 가훈에는
CA[bm1251]CZ 충성 조항 외에도
무사의 생활 규범이 많았다…

direct_pc_sources.en: The ninety-nine precepts of the Takeda were not only about swearing loyalty to CA[bm1251]CZ, but also concerned rules of standard conduct for samurai.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
九十九か条にわたる武田信繁家訓には、
CA[bm1251]CZへの忠義を誓わせる項目以外にも
武士の生活規範を示す項目も多くあり…
direct_pc_sources.sc:
在多达九十九条的武田信繁家训中，
除了对于CA[bm1251]CZ的效忠条目以外，
也记录了多条规范武士生活的条目……
direct_pc_sources.tc:
多達九十九條的武田信繁家訓，
除了對CA[bm1251]CZ宣示忠義的項目以外，
也有許多展現武士生活規範的項目……

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
CC교토CZ 기름장수는 CC미노CZ의 CB도키CZ에 들어가
무장이 됐고, 아들 CA[bm924]CZ은
CB도키CZ를 몰아내 전국 다이묘가 됐다.

direct_pc_sources.en: The oil merchant left the CCcapitalCZ for CCMinoCZ and became a powerful retainer of the governing CBToki ClanCZ. His son CA[bm924]CZ eventually ousted that clan to become daimyª.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CC京CZからCC美濃CZへ赴いた油商人が、守護CB土岐氏CZに
取り入って有力武将となり、その子CA[bm924]CZが
CB土岐氏CZを追放して戦国大名となった。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
从CC京都CZ前往CC美浓CZ的卖油商，被地方守护
CB土岐氏CZ相中，成为了一名有为的武将。
其子CA[bm924]CZ流放CB土岐氏CZ成了战国大名。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
自CC京都CZ赴CC美濃CZ的賣油行商人，
效力守護CB土岐氏CZ成為有力的武將，
其子CA[bm924]CZ流放CB土岐氏CZ，成為戰國大名。

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
이해 CC미노CZ의 다이묘 CA사이토 다카마사CZ는
소수 병력으로 상경해 쇼군
CA[b75]CZ에게 배알했다.

direct_pc_sources.en: This year, Daimyª CATakamasa SaitªCZ of CCMinoCZ had brought a small number of troops with him to the CCcapitalCZ, where he was to have an audience with Shªgun CA[b75]CZ.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
この年、CC美濃CZの戦国大名・CA斎藤高政CZは
わずかな手勢を引き連れて上洛し、
将軍CA[b75]CZに拝謁している。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
这一年，CC美浓CZ的战国大名·CA斋藤高政CZ
仅带领少数手下上京，
拜谒将军CA[b75]CZ。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
這一年，CC美濃CZ的戰國大名CA齋藤高政CZ
率領了少數兵力上京，
去謁見了將軍CA[b75]CZ。

entries.current_ko_at_batch07_strict_baseline:
황공합니다.
CA[bm924]CZ은 부친이나 불의를 거듭해
백성 원성이 커 부득이 토벌했습니다.

direct_pc_sources.en: I am afraid so. My father was an unjust leader on many accounts. He inspired hatred even among the common people. While difficult, it was an act which needed to be done.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
恐れ入りまする。我が父…ながら、
CA[bm924]CZには非道の行い多く、国衆からの恨みの
声もあり、やむにやまれず討ちました。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
不敢当。CA[bm924]CZ……虽为我的父亲，
却多行不义，在民众之中积怨已深。
因此不得不将其讨伐。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
不敢當。雖然……他身為我的父親，
但是CA[bm924]CZ有過諸多暴行，民眾對他積怨已深，
不得已只好殺了他。

direct_pc_sources.en: CAUjiyasuCZ had met with CA[b1251]CZ, who was part of CAYoshimotoCZÖs reinforcements, and requested peace to be mediated soon after the fighting started.
direct_pc_sources.jp:

戦いが始まった直後から
和睦の仲介を依頼していたのである。

就依赖其作为和解的中间人。

entries.review_judgement: The strict current row correctly migrated the legacy literal name to the direct-PC-compatible runtime token. Preserve that token while restoring attention to the reinforcements and the request for mediation immediately after the battle began.

judgement_groups.reason: The legacy Korean is source-complete and already uses valid Korean semantic boundaries under the strict-name reservation.
3443, 3455, and 3456 are manually reflowed to pass the 30/48-scaled full-name reservation without removing meaning.
3611 retains the current direct-PC-compatible runtime token rather than reverting to the legacy literal name.
Each row has at least one runtime token, an exact strict-table name hash, and a catalog full-name reservation scaled by 30/48.

layout_baseline.authority: Static Patch 007 verified PK event-dialogue layout
layout_baseline.runtime_reservation_policy: Use the exact strict name-table row for evidence, reserve the catalog full-name width within this 17-row scope, then scale by 30/48. No prefix semantics or runtime rendering behavior is inferred.

strict_name_table_evidence.reservation_scope: The reservation review is scene-limited to the listed 17 event rows; it does not claim live runtime token-prefix behavior.
